channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Gen Z Is Pushing Back Against AI: A Reminder That Future Isn't Written

media:content.media:description: Gen Z graduates boo AI praise at ceremonies, exposing a deep generational tech rift

item.description: Viral footage of grads booing AI-boosting speakers reveals a deepening generational rift, as Gen Z pushes back against tech elders' optimism
item.content:encoded: Viral footage of grads booing AI-boosting speakers reveals a deepening generational rift, as Gen Z pushes back against tech elders' optimism

item.title: SpaceX Short Sellers Make $4 Billion: Why Investors Are Betting Against Elon Musk

media:content.media:description: SpaceX has a vibrant secondary market where early investors sell their holdings to eligible buyers.

item.description: Despite the recent pressure on its market valuation, analysts believe SpaceX remains the global leader in commercial space launches.
item.content:encoded: Despite the recent pressure on its market valuation, analysts believe SpaceX remains the global leader in commercial space launches.

item.title: 3 Things To Know About Trump's Election Fraud Allegations Againt China

media:content.media:description: Trump relied on CIA documents about purported election-rigging

item.description: Trump has made the claim that the 2020 elections were "rigged" more than 100 times over the first half of 2026, and has used those claims to push for Congress to pass a restrictive voter ID law called the SAVE America Act
item.content:encoded: Trump has made the claim that the 2020 elections were "rigged" more than 100 times over the first half of 2026, and has used those claims to push for Congress to pass a restrictive voter ID law called the SAVE America Act

item.title: At Least 14 Dead As Minibus Falls Into Ravine In Peru

media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to recover victims after a minibus plunged into a ravine in Peru

item.description: A minibus carrying 19 passengers plunged into a ravine near San Juan, Peru, killing 14 and injuring five, with six bodies still unrecovered
item.content:encoded: A minibus carrying 19 passengers plunged into a ravine near San Juan, Peru, killing 14 and injuring five, with six bodies still unrecovered

item.title: China's Xi Says AI Should Not Be Dominated By One Nation

media:content.media:description: China's President Speaks at World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai

item.description: AI has become a strategic pillar of China's industrial policy, driven by state investment aimed at building a domestic ecosystem, from chip production to consumer use.
item.content:encoded: AI has become a strategic pillar of China's industrial policy, driven by state investment aimed at building a domestic ecosystem, from chip production to consumer use.

item.title: US Immigration Officer In Maine Shooting Has History Of Violent Behavio: Report

media:content.media:description: ICE officer accused of violent past shot and killed a Colombian man in Maine

item.description: David Brouillette's relatives accuse him of attacking women in his life over the years, and one shared a voicemail from last winter in which he told her that he thought someone should slit her throat.
item.content:encoded: David Brouillette's relatives accuse him of attacking women in his life over the years, and one shared a voicemail from last winter in which he told her that he thought someone should slit her throat.

item.title: Andy Burnham: 'King Of The North' To Become Next UK PM

media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham was to be appointed leader of the ruling Labour party on Friday

item.description: Andy Burnham's elevation to the top job follows a successful nine-year stint as Greater Manchester mayor, during which Burnham transformed himself from former government minister to a political outsider.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham's elevation to the top job follows a successful nine-year stint as Greater Manchester mayor, during which Burnham transformed himself from former government minister to a political outsider.

item.title: Hundreds vs Zero: Stealth Divide That Could Define Next India-China Conflict

media:content.media:description: China's J-20 Mighty Dragon fifth-generation fighter jet (File)

item.description: If war were to break out between India and China tomorrow, one side could send hundreds of stealth fighter jets into battle, while the other may not be able to send even one.
item.content:encoded: If war were to break out between India and China tomorrow, one side could send hundreds of stealth fighter jets into battle, while the other may not be able to send even one.

item.title: Trump-Backed Gaza Recovery Plan Now Just A Pilot Project: Report

media:content.media:description: The proposal includes a temporary camp.

item.description: The revised plan now focuses on setting up a temporary settlement for a small number of displaced Palestinians, instead of undertaking a territory-wide reconstruction effort.
item.content:encoded: The revised plan now focuses on setting up a temporary settlement for a small number of displaced Palestinians, instead of undertaking a territory-wide reconstruction effort.

item.title: Trump Claims China Stole US Voters' Data. Why Not Everyone Is Convinced

media:content.media:description: Trump stopped short of saying the alleged Chinese activity actually changed who won

item.description: Alongside the China allegation, the White House used the moment to unveil a new "Election Integrity" section on its website, dumping declassified documents across four broad areas.
item.content:encoded: Alongside the China allegation, the White House used the moment to unveil a new "Election Integrity" section on its website, dumping declassified documents across four broad areas.

item.title: 7 Killed In Iran As US Military Targets Bridges, Airport, And Train Station

media:content.media:description: Trump has returned to his threats to target Iranian civil infrastructure (File Photo)

item.description: The US military's Central Command (CENTCOM) said it hit dozens of targets in its latest airstrikes, which concluded at dawn Friday, the sixth night in a row of American attacks.
item.content:encoded: The US military's Central Command (CENTCOM) said it hit dozens of targets in its latest airstrikes, which concluded at dawn Friday, the sixth night in a row of American attacks.

item.title: "Nightmare": Trump Claims China Interfered In 2020 US Polls, Beijing Responds

media:content.media:description: Trump addressed US voters in televised prime-time address from the White House.

item.description: More than 60 lawsuits by Trump and his allies produced no ruling establishing fraud capable of changing the outcome of the 2020 election, while recounts, audits, and his own Justice Department found none.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1128737/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>More than 60 lawsuits by Trump and his allies produced no ruling establishing fraud capable of changing the outcome of the 2020 election, while recounts, audits, and his own Justice Department found none.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: 7 Killed As US Launches 6th Consecutive Night Of Strikes Against Iran
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: A fifth of all traded crude oil and natural gas passed through the Strait of Hormuz before the war, when it was open to all without tolls.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: A fifth of all traded crude oil and natural gas passed through the Strait of Hormuz before the war, when it was open to all without tolls.

item.title: Team Trump Alters Rule To Deny Green Cards To Immigrants Using Public Benefits

media:content.media:description: There were 22.8 million noncitizens living in the U.S. in 2023, according to the Census Bureau.

item.description: The Trump administration is reviving a rule that could deny green cards to immigrants who use public benefits that could include food stamps, Medicaid, housing vouchers and others.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration is reviving a rule that could deny green cards to immigrants who use public benefits that could include food stamps, Medicaid, housing vouchers and others.

item.title: Firefighters Give Oxygen To Pigeon After It Suffers Smoke Inhalation From Car Fire In US

media:content.media:description: The background of the video showed a chaotic scene with flashing lights and a fire truck.

item.description: Oakland firefighters assisted a pigeon suffering smoke inhalation from a car fire by administering oxygen before it flew away.
item.content:encoded: Oakland firefighters assisted a pigeon suffering smoke inhalation from a car fire by administering oxygen before it flew away.

item.title: Nitish Kaushal, Member Of Jaggu Bhagwanpuria Gang, Arrested In US

media:content.media:description: Indian-origin gangster Nitish Kaushal has been arrested in Vermont.

item.description: Indian-origin gangster Nitish Kaushal's arrest comes two days after FBI put him to its "wanted" list.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1128789/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Indian-origin gangster Nitish Kaushal's arrest comes two days after FBI put him to its "wanted" list.

item.title: US Attacks Iran In Tit-For-Tat Strikes, Hits Airport, Railway Station, Bridges

media:content.media:description: According to Iranian media, two people had died and four were injured in the attack.

item.description: US strikes overnight hit an airport and two bridges in southern Iran near the Strait of Hormuz, Iranian state media said Friday.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1128724/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US strikes overnight hit an airport and two bridges in southern Iran near the Strait of Hormuz, Iranian state media said Friday.

item.title: She Knew He Wasn't Real. One Woman's Romance Scam Story

media:content.media:description: Romance scams are on the rise across the United States.

item.description: She knew somewhere in the back of her mind that Donnie didn't exist. She also knew that before she hit the road again, in spite of all logic and months of warnings from everyone in her life, she'd send the money anyway.
item.content:encoded: She knew somewhere in the back of her mind that Donnie didn't exist. She also knew that before she hit the road again, in spite of all logic and months of warnings from everyone in her life, she'd send the money anyway.

item.title: US Announces Visa Curbs On Members Linked To "Far-Left Terrorist" Groups

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio said leftist extremism draws its inspiration from a "hatred for civilization itself."

item.description: The United States on Thursday launched a scathing attack on left-wing extremists, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio calling for global cooperation to fight a "new wave of this old evil."
item.content:encoded: The United States on Thursday launched a scathing attack on left-wing extremists, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio calling for global cooperation to fight a "new wave of this old evil."

item.title: SpaceX Starship Rocket Aborts Before Liftoff In 13th Flight Test Attempt

media:content.media:description: The rocket's engines ignited but cut off shortly after, it said.

item.description: SpaceX's Starship rocket triggered a last-second abort before liftoff for its 13th flight test from Texas on Thursday, postponing the mission by at least 24 hours with the company studying what likely caused the automated scrub.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX's Starship rocket triggered a last-second abort before liftoff for its 13th flight test from Texas on Thursday, postponing the mission by at least 24 hours with the company studying what likely caused the automated scrub.
